name: LAKELAND FINANCIAL CORP
business: Lakeland Financial Corporation provides commercial and consumer banking services, trust and wealth management, brokerage, and treasury management services through its wholly owned subsidiary, Lake City Bank. The company serves a diverse customer base across a wide variety of industries including commercial real estate, manufacturing, agriculture, construction, retail, wholesale, finance and insurance, accommodation and food services, and health care. At December 31, 2025, the company had consolidated total assets of $7.0 billion.

exposures.sentence: We invest from time to time in investment funds that seek to promote the development of such new and emerging financial technologies.
Data processing fees and supplies expense increased $1.4 million, or 9.1%, from continued investment in customer-facing and operational technology solutions, including artificial intelligence.

Our competitors include national, regional and community banks, e-commerce and other fintech or nonbanking companies offering financial services, private credit funds, thrifts, credit unions, farm credit services, finance companies, personal loan companies, brokerage firms, investment companies, insurance companies, mortgage banking companies, credit card issuers and mutual fund companies.
